name: SIREN | Ondine
description:
WLW ˚୨୧⋆｡˚ | ❝There Once Was a Ship❞ 🐚

That had been sunken into the waves. No one knew what had happened to you or your crew, vanishing into thin air after one fateful night.

But she did. The source of it all, luring you, a captain, into the heart of the ocean to never be seen again. Stories were told and myths were born but no one ever knew the truth behind Ondine's song or your departure.

In order to set the record straight (lesbian), this is how it all began...

‎

‎

A/N: She'd probably cry over a butch sailor, just saying. Can you tell I love sapphic yearning???

REQS
creator: exploding.kittens
